children.label:
{
  workflows,
  value,
  onChange,
  singleSelection = false,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'workflowComboBox',
  ...comboBoxProps
}
id
description:
Active conversation id, if one already exists.
Undefined means we're currently in a new conversation.

children.label: conversation
description:
The currently bound conversation, when it has been successfully fetched.
Undefined while the conversation is new, still loading, or failed to load.

interfaces.label: AgentBuilderPluginStart
description: Public start contract for the browser-side agentBuilder plugin.

children.label: agents
description: Agent service contract, can be used to list agents.

children.label: attachments
description: Attachment service contract, can be used to register and retrieve attachment UI definitions.

children.label: tools
description: Tool service contract, can be used to list or execute tools.

children.label: events
description: Events service contract, can be used to listen to chat events.

children.label: openChat
description: Opens the conversation sidebar.

children.label: options
description: - Configuration options for the sidebar

returnComment: An object containing the sidebar reference

children.label: toggleChat
description:
Toggles the conversation sidebar.

If the sidebar is open, it will be closed. Otherwise, it will be opened.

children.label: addAttachment
description:
Adds an attachment to the active conversation sidebar.
If no sidebar is open, the attachment is ignored.

children.label: attachment
description: - The attachment to add

children.label: updateAttachmentOrigin
description:
Updates the origin of an attachment in a conversation.
Use this after saving a by-value attachment to link it to its persistent store.
signature: (conversationId: string, attachmentId: string, origin: string) => Promise<

children.label: conversationId
description: - The conversation containing the attachment

children.label: attachmentId
description: - The ID of the attachment to update

children.label: origin
description: - Origin string for the attachment (e.g. saved object id); same value passed to `resolve` on the server

returnComment: Promise resolving to the update result

interfaces.label: AgentsServiceStartContract
description: Public-faving contract for AgentBuilder's agents service.

children.label: list
description: List all agents available.

interfaces.label: AttachmentServiceStartContract
description: Public-facing contract for the attachment service.

children.label: addAttachmentType
description: Registers a UI definition for a specific attachment type.

children.label: attachmentType
description: - The unique identifier for the attachment type

children.label: definition
description: - The UI definition for rendering this attachment type

children.label: getAttachmentUiDefinition
description: Retrieves the UI definition for a specific attachment type.

children.label: attachmentType
description: - The type identifier to look up

returnComment: The UI definition if registered, undefined otherwise

interfaces.label: AttachmentUIDefinition
description: UI definition for rendering attachments of a specific type.

children.label: getLabel
description: Returns a human-readable label for the attachment.

children.label: getIcon
description: Returns the icon type to display for the attachment.

children.label: onClick
description:
Optional custom click handler for attachment pills.
When provided, pills will invoke this instead of the default behavior.

children.label: renderInlineContent
description:
Optional custom content renderer for inline attachment display.
When provided, attachments can be rendered inline in the conversation
using the <render_attachment> tag.

The `callbacks` object provides:
- `registerActionButtons`: dynamically register action buttons in the inline header

children.label: canvasWidth
description:
Optional preferred width for the canvas flyout when opened in full-screen context.
Accepts any valid CSS width value (e.g. `'600px'`, `'40vw'`).
Defaults to `'50vw'` when not specified.
Has no effect in sidebar context.

children.label: renderCanvasContent
description:
Optional custom content renderer for canvas mode (expanded flyout view).
When provided, attachments can be opened in an expanded view via action buttons.

The `props` object includes `openSidebarConversation` for opening the sidebar with the current conversation.

The `callbacks` object provides:
- `registerActionButtons`: dynamically register action buttons in the canvas header
- `updateOrigin`: link by-value attachments to persistent storage after saving

children.label: getActionButtons
description:
Optional function to provide action buttons for inline-rendered attachments.
Buttons will appear alongside or below the rendered content.

children.label: activeConversation$
description:
Emits the currently active conversation binding for both the embeddable sidebar and
the full-page routed chat. Emits `null` when no chat surface is currently bound.

Backed by a `BehaviorSubject`: new subscribers receive the current value immediately.

interfaces.label: ConversationSidebarRef
description: Handle to control a conversation sidebar programmatically.

interfaces.label: EmbeddableConversationProps
description:
Props for the embeddable conversation component.
Configures conversation behavior when embedded in the sidebar or other host.

children.label: newConversation
description:
Force starting a new conversation, ignoring any stored conversation IDs.
When true, a fresh conversation is always created.

children.label: sessionTag
description:
Session tag for conversation context. Used to maintain separate conversation
histories for different parts of the application.

Examples:
- 'dashboard' - Conversations started from dashboard page
- 'search' - Conversations started from search interface
- 'observability' - Conversations in observability context

Combined with agentId to restore the correct conversation when the sidebar reopens.

children.label: agentId
description:
Specific agent ID to use for this conversation.
If not provided, uses the last selected agent from localStorage.

Examples:
- 'platform.core.dashboard' - Dashboard agent
- 'platform.core.general' - General agent

children.label: initialMessage
description:
Optional initial message content to use when starting a new conversation.
Only applies when creating a new conversation (not when restoring existing ones).
Use with `autoSendInitialMessage` to control whether this message is automatically sent.

Example: 'Show me error logs from the last hour'

children.label: autoSendInitialMessage
description:
Whether to automatically send the initial message when starting a new conversation.
Only applies when creating a new conversation (not when restoring existing ones).
Requires `initialMessage` to be provided.

children.label: attachments
description:
Optional attachments with lazy content loading.
Content will be fetched when starting a new conversation round.
It will be appended only if it has changed since previous conversation round.

children.label: browserApiTools

interfaces.label: EventsServiceStartContract
description: Public-facing contract for AgentBuilder's events service.

children.label: chat$
description: (hot) observable of all chat events.

children.label: ui
description: Chat UI-shell state observables.

interfaces.label: OpenConversationSidebarOptions
description: Options passed when opening or toggling the conversation sidebar.

interfaces.label: OpenConversationSidebarReturn
description: Return value from opening the conversation sidebar.

interfaces.label: ToolServiceStartContract
description: Public-facing contract for AgentBuilder's tool service.

children.label: get
description: Retrieve a tool based on its ID.

children.label: list
description: List all tools available in the current context.

children.label: execute
description: Execute a tool and returns the results.

children.label: listWorkflows
description: List available workflows for pre-execution selection.
